changes: Removed separate implementations of metrics and diff list
Introduced BuildDetailClient component to handle metrics and diff rendering
Simplified page component by delegating complex rendering to BuildDetailClient

patterns_discovered: Component extraction for complex rendering logic
Passing metrics and diffs as props to a dedicated client component
Simplified server component by moving rendering complexity to client-side
gotchas_discovered: Previous implementation had hardcoded status icon and color mappings
Manual diff sorting was removed in favor of client-side handling
Inline image rendering replaced with client component

approach_outcome.primary_goal: Update page.tsx to use BuildDetailClient for metrics and diff list
refactoring_benefits: More modular and maintainable code structure
Easier to extend and modify diff rendering logic

recommendations: Consider adding prop types or TypeScript interfaces for BuildDetailClient
Add error boundaries to client components for better error handling
Create unit tests for BuildDetailClient to ensure robust rendering
